name: Sweet Blue Flowers
overview: Fumi Manjoume enters Kamakura's accelerated  high school - Matsuoka All-Girls High School.  While waiting at the  Kamakura station on the day of her entrance ceremony, she runs into an  old childhood friend whom she had not seen in 10 years: Akira Okudaira.  As their friendship is rekindled and they start falling back into the  rhythm of friends again, it starts a delicate love story...
